item.name: BC Registration/Login
item.description:
This registration/login flow uses the main BigCommerce GraphQL Storefront API and is an _alternative_ to the B2B GraphQL registration/login flow.

This flow requires a private token to be generated for the main GQL Storefront API and includes a request to exchange a customer access tokekn for a B2B user token.

item.name: B2B Registration/Login

graphql.query:
mutation CreateCompany(
    $storeHash: String!,
    $customerId: String!,
    $customerEmail: String!,
    $companyName: String!,
    $companyEmail: String,
    $addressLine1: String!,
    $city: String!,
    $country: String!,
    $state: String!,
    $zipCode: String!,
    $channelId: Int
) {
    companyCreate(
        companyData: {
            storeHash: $storeHash,
            customerId: $customerId,
            customerEmail: $customerEmail,
            companyName: $companyName,
            companyEmail: $companyEmail,
            addressLine1: $addressLine1,
            city: $city,
            country: $country,
            state: $state,
            zipCode: $zipCode,
            channelId: $channelId
        }
    ) {
        company {
            id
            companyName
        }
    }
}
graphql.variables:
{
    "storeHash": "{{store_hash}}",
    "customerId": "<Customer ID>",
    "customerEmail": "<Customer Email>",
    "companyName": "John's Widgets",
    "companyEmail": "johndoe@example.com",
    "addressLine1": "987 Park Central East",
    "city": "Austin",
    "country": "United States",
    "state": "Texas",
    "zipCode": "78726",
    "channelId": <Channel ID>
}

graphql.query:
mutation CreateAddress(
    $companyId: Int!,
    $firstName: String!,
    $lastName: String!,
    $addressLine1: String!,
    $addressLine2: String,
    $country: String!,
    $countryCode: String!,
    $state: String!,
    $stateCode: String,
    $city: String!,
    $zipCode: String!,
    $phoneNumber: String,
    $isShipping: Int,
    $isBilling: Int,
    $isDefaultShipping: Int,
    $isDefaultBilling: Int,
    $label: String,
    $company: String
) {
    addressCreate(
        addressData: {
            companyId: $companyId,
            firstName: $firstName,
            lastName: $lastName,
            addressLine1: $addressLine1,
            addressLine2: $addressLine2,
            country: $country,
            countryCode: $countryCode,
            state: $state,
            stateCode: $stateCode,
            city: $city,
            zipCode: $zipCode,
            phoneNumber: $phoneNumber,
            isShipping: $isShipping,
            isBilling: $isBilling,
            isDefaultShipping: $isDefaultShipping,
            isDefaultBilling: $isDefaultBilling,
            label: $label,
            company: $company
        }
    ) {
        address {
            id
            label
            isShipping
            isBilling
            isDefaultShipping
            isDefaultBilling
        }
    }
}

{
    "companyId": <Company ID>,
    "firstName": "Jack",
    "lastName": "Doe",
    "addressLine1": "456 Downtown Lane",

    "country": "United States",
    "countryCode": "US",

graphql.query:
mutation UpdateAddress(
    $companyId: Int!,
    $addressId: Int!,
    $firstName: String!,
    $lastName: String!,
    $addressLine1: String!,
    $addressLine2: String,
    $country: String!,
    $countryCode: String!,
    $state: String!,
    $stateCode: String,
    $city: String!,
    $zipCode: String!,
    $phoneNumber: String,
    $isShipping: Int,
    $isBilling: Int,
    $isDefaultShipping: Int,
    $isDefaultBilling: Int,
    $label: String,
    $company: String
) {
    addressUpdate(
        addressData: {
            companyId: $companyId,
            addressId: $addressId,
            firstName: $firstName,
            lastName: $lastName,
            addressLine1: $addressLine1,
            addressLine2: $addressLine2,
            country: $country,
            countryCode: $countryCode,
            state: $state,
            stateCode: $stateCode,
            city: $city,
            zipCode: $zipCode,
            phoneNumber: $phoneNumber,
            isShipping: $isShipping,
            isBilling: $isBilling,
            isDefaultShipping: $isDefaultShipping,
            isDefaultBilling: $isDefaultBilling,
            label: $label,
            company: $company
        }
    ) {
        address {
            id
            label
            isShipping
            isBilling
            isDefaultShipping
            isDefaultBilling
        }
    }
}

graphql.query:
mutation CreateQuote(
    $message: String,
    $subtotal: Decimal!,
    $discount: Decimal!,
    $grandTotal: Decimal!,
    $userEmail: String,
    $quoteTitle: String,
    $shippingAddress: ShippingAddressInputType!,
    $billingAddress: BillingAddressInputType!,
    $contactInfo: ContactInfoInputType!,
    $companyId: Int,
    $currency: CurrencyInputType!,
    $storeHash: String!,
    $productList: [ProductInputType]!,
    $channelId: Int
) {
    quoteCreate(
        quoteData: {
            message: $message,
            subtotal: $subtotal,
            discount: $discount,
            grandTotal: $grandTotal,
            userEmail: $userEmail,
            quoteTitle: $quoteTitle,
            shippingAddress: $shippingAddress,
            billingAddress: $billingAddress,
            contactInfo: $contactInfo,
            companyId: $companyId,
            currency: $currency,
            storeHash: $storeHash,
            productList: $productList,
            channelId: $channelId
        }
    ) {
        quote {
            id
            uuid
            createdAt
            quoteNumber
            quoteTitle
            quoteUrl
        }
    }
}

graphql.query:
query GetQuotes(
    $limit: Int,
    $after: String,
    $orderBy: String
) {
    quotes(
        first: $limit,
        after: $after,
        orderBy: $orderBy
    ) {
        pageInfo {
            hasNextPage
            hasPreviousPage
            startCursor
            endCursor
        }
        totalCount
        edges {
            node {
                id
                uuid
                createdAt
                quoteNumber
                quoteTitle
                createdBy
                createdByEmail
                expiredAt
                subtotal
                discount
                discountType
                discountValue
                shippingTotal
                taxTotal
                grandTotal
                totalAmount
                orderId
                bcOrderId
                contactInfo
                trackingHistory
                notes
                legalTerms
                shippingMethod
                billingAddress
                shippingAddress
                salesRepInfo {
                    salesRepName
                    salesRepEmail
                }
                productsList {
                    productId
                    variantId
                    sku
                    basePrice
                    discount
                    offeredPrice
                    quantity
                    imageUrl
                    productName
                    options
                    notes
                    productUrl
                    type
                }
                quoteUrl
            }
        }
    }
}

graphql.query:
query GetQuote(
    $id: Int!,
    $storeHash: String!,
    $date: String!,
    $uuid: String!
) {
    quote(
        id: $id,
        storeHash: $storeHash,
        date: $date,
        uuid: $uuid
    ) {
        id
        createdAt
        quoteNumber
        quoteTitle
        bcCustomerId
        createdBy
        createdByEmail
        expiredAt
        companyInfo {
            companyId
            companyName
        }
        status
        salesRepStatus
        customerStatus
        subtotal
        discount
        grandTotal
        shippingTotal
        taxTotal
        totalAmount
        discountType
        discountValue
        cartId
        cartUrl
        checkoutUrl
        orderId
        bcOrderId
        contactInfo
        trackingHistory
        notes
        legalTerms
        shippingMethod
        billingAddress
        shippingAddress
        pdfTemplate
        pdfLang
        salesRepInfo {
            salesRepName
            salesRepEmail
        }
        productsList {
            productId
            variantId
            sku
            options
            basePrice
            discount
            offeredPrice
            quantity
            imageUrl
            productName
            options
            notes
            purchaseHandled
            productUrl
            type
            isFreeShipping
            availability
        }
        quoteUrl
    }
}

graphql.query:
query GetOrder(
    $id: Int!
) {
    order(
        id: $id
    ) {
        id
        firstName
        lastName
        status
        customerId
        dateCreated
        subtotalExTax
        subtotalIncTax
        subtotalTax
        baseShippingCost
        shippingCostExTax
        shippingCostIncTax
        totalTax
        discountAmount
        totalExTax
        totalIncTax
        itemsTotal
        itemsShipped
        paymentMethod
        poNumber
        products
        billingAddress
        shippingAddress
        shipments
        invoiceId
        orderHistoryEvent {
            id
            eventType
            status
        }
    }
}
